dimensions.label: Technical correctness
dimensions.guidance: Correct vulnerability/solve logic with no major factual errors.

dimensions.label: Exploit/solve completeness
dimensions.guidance: End-to-end path to objective/flag, not partial probing only.

dimensions.label: Evidence quality
dimensions.guidance: Concrete outputs, flags, hashes, logs, and proof-of-success artifacts.

dimensions.label: Reproducibility
dimensions.guidance: Another operator can follow steps and reproduce key results.

dimensions.label: Communication clarity
dimensions.guidance: Clear structure, concise explanations, and coherent reasoning.
